name: Cajun Barramundi & Garlic Shrimp
headline: with Edamame Succotash, Grilled Potatoes & Remoulade
description: Nothing says summer quite like succulent grilled seafood. This Bayou barramundi is grilled to perfection to form the centerpiece to a Southern-inspired feast. Shrimp is seasoned with garlic and steamed until tender, while hearty potatoes are finished on the grill for a hint of charred flavor. Buttery, Cajun-spiced edamame succotash rounds out the meal. Serve the savory hot-sauce remoulade on the side for dipping or drizzle it over your fish for an extra spicy kick.
